en: Gets the synonyms of a word and stores them.
Can get multiple results, storing in a non-list variable/metadata tag will store only 1 of the results.
Gets the definition of a word and stores it.
Gets the antonyms (or opposites) of a word and stores them.
Can get multiple results, storing in a non-list variable/metadata tag will store only 1 of the results.
Due to api limitations you cannot retrieve a set amount of non english words, non english words with a set length or specify both amount and length.

Will send a warning if used to inform about this limitation, to disable the warning simply go to 'plugins/SkriptLanguage/config.yml', set 'randomWordWarning' to false, save and run /skriptlanguage (which is the config reload command as of 1.2.0).
